note: Walkthrough help videos for the Shopkeeper app. Published to mavrify-releases as release assets (tag videos-v<manifestVersion>) by .github/workflows/publish-walkthrough-videos.yml; the app's VideoCacheRepository downloads + sha256-verifies each entry on first launch and caches it offline. `section` ties a clip to a setup-wizard stage; `family` matches the walkthrough bundle family id (skin-walkthroughs.json). Add new clips by dropping the mp4 in provisioning/walkthrough-videos/, adding an entry here with its sha256 + size, and bumping manifestVersion.

videos.title_ur: سام سنگ: ڈیولپر آپشنز آن کریں
سام سنگ: وائرلیس ڈی بگنگ آن کریں
